valid.name: grant-to-role
valid.code: GRANT SELECT ON users TO reporting;

valid.name: revoke-from-public
valid.code: REVOKE ALL ON users FROM PUBLIC;

invalid.name: grant-to-public
invalid.code: GRANT SELECT ON users TO PUBLIC;

errors.message: Avoid `GRANT ... TO PUBLIC`. The PUBLIC role covers every current and future role in the database, including ones added later for unrelated services. Name the role(s) you actually want to grant to.
